doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The “EAJP-2025” protocol does not match any known California State Bar or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission document and includes implausible authority and procedures.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: The cited “EAJP-2025” protocol and provisions appear nonexistent and inconsistent with California State Bar authority and known legal-services rules.
